description: CCH internal enums used by API writes. Mirrored from the cch-risk-assessment skill where applicable. Update both if CCH adds new values.

inherent_risk_and_control_risk._note_surface: ir/cr/rmm/PlannedAuditApproach are written against KBA-502's wpId at collectionKey .{AREA}.RelevantAssertion. The AUD-8xx program's own RelevantAssertion grid is a DERIVED view — direct writes there are discarded on refresh. The KBA-400 relevant-assertion SELECTION remains a separate surface: .KBA400.AuditareaRelevantAssertions. See field-conventions.md §3 rows 58-60 / §4 lines 89-90.

values.when: Active program includes analytical procedure steps

planned_audit_approach.warning: API returns state=3 for ANY valueKey written, even invalid ones, AND the immediate in-page GET reads the uncommitted working copy so it shows state=3 right away. Immediate state=3 is NOT proof of persistence — an invalid/bad key drops on reload. Always use exactly COMBINED/ANALYTICAL/INDEPTH, and verify AFTER submit+reload via the diagnostics endpoint, never the immediate GET.

financial_assertions._note_surface_split: Two distinct surfaces use these assertion keys. KBA-400 relevant-assertion SELECTION (which assertions are relevant per area) lives on KBA-400 at .KBA400.AuditareaRelevantAssertions. The IR/CR (and RMM / PlannedAuditApproach) grid keyed by assertion is written against KBA-502's wpId at collectionKey .{AREA}.RelevantAssertion; the AUD-8xx program's RelevantAssertion grid is a DERIVED view whose direct writes are discarded on refresh. Do not conflate them: select on KBA-400, set IR/CR/RMM/approach on KBA-502. See field-conventions.md §3 rows 58-60 / §4 lines 89-90.

risks_property_codes.format: Semicolon-joined valueKeys with TRAILING semi. Full-state replacement.

values.notes: N is the per-engagement risk number

risks_property_codes.warning: Sending unknown codes returns 500 'Index was outside the bounds of the array'. Verify codes against DOM checkbox names before writing.
